scripts.aws:deploy: npx cdk deploy Intel-Feature-Registry-IamStack-$(whoami | tr -d .) -c devMode=true -c suffix=$(whoami | tr -d .) -c deploymentStage=blue -c temporary=true --require-approval never --method direct --asset-parallelism
scripts.aws:deploy:lambda:blue: npx cdk deploy Intel-Feature-Registry-LambdaStack-$(whoami | tr -d .)-blue -c devMode=true -c suffix=$(whoami | tr -d .) -c deploymentStage=blue -c temporary=true --require-approval never --method direct --asset-parallelism
scripts.aws:deploy:lambda:green: npx cdk deploy Intel-Feature-Registry-LambdaStack-$(whoami | tr -d .)-green -c devMode=true -c suffix=$(whoami | tr -d .) -c deploymentStage=green -c temporary=true --require-approval never --method direct --asset-parallelism
scripts.aws:destroy: npx cdk destroy Intel-Feature-Registry-IamStack-$(whoami | tr -d .) -c devMode=true -c suffix=$(whoami | tr -d .) -c deploymentStage=blue -c temporary=true --force --require-approval never
scripts.build: npm run build:tsc && npm run build:python
scripts.build:python: UV_NATIVE_TLS=true uv sync && npm run format:python
scripts.format: npm run format:tsc && npm run format:python
scripts.format:python: UV_NATIVE_TLS=true uv run ruff check . --fix && UV_NATIVE_TLS=true uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint: npm run lint:tsc && npm run lint:python
